---
title: "Data Exploration"
author: "Fox Redmond"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

Exploring Food & Drink data from Farm to Table on April 17th. 

```{r, message = FALSE, echo= FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(shiny)
library(DT)
library(shiny)
library(knitr)
```


```{r, message = FALSE, echo= FALSE}
url <- "~/repos/data_story_5/app_data.csv"
f2t <- read.csv(url, header = FALSE)
ft2_labled <- f2t %>% rename("Entry time" = "V1", "Food/Drink" = "V2", "Before/After Farm to Table" = "V3", "Quantity (lbs)" = "V4")
```


```{r, echo= FALSE}
ggplot(f2t,
       aes(x = V3,
           y = V4,
           fill = V2
       )) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Before", "After")) +
  labs(title = "Tracking Consumption at Farm to Table",
       x = "Before and After Farm to Table Meal",
       y = "Quantity of Food/Drink (lbs)")
```

```{r, echo= FALSE}
ft2_labled %>% kable
```
